app_description: FastAPI + pydantic-ai. User identity = phone number stored in DB. No per-conversation UUID — phone number is the only identifier. Multi-turn chat, users can start fresh conversations.

assertions.description: Identifies that phone number is a stable user identifier that outlives individual conversations and must NOT be used as session_id
Proposes generating a UUID per logical conversation (e.g. kelet_session_id), storing it in the DB/session store, and regenerating on fresh-conversation reset
Passes the phone number as user_id= in agentic_session(), not as session_id=
Explicitly mentions that the fresh-conversation reset feature would be invisible to Kelet if phone number is used as session_id
VoteFeedback session_id is wired to the kelet_session_id (per-conversation UUID), not the phone number
kelet.configure() is added at startup (module level), not per-request
The generated code does not pass phone number as session_id= anywhere
